hook.summary: A character reveals a strong poker hand and smiles confidently.
hook.visual_action: Close-up of yellow hands revealing a pair of 7s followed by a wide-grinning character face.

scene_flow: A character reveals a pocket pair of 7s at a poker table.
The character gives a wide, confident grin to his opponents.
The other players at the table react with visible shock and concern.
The character pushes a massive pile of green and red chips into the pot.
The game logo 'Hold'em or Fold'em' appears with app store download buttons.
audience_proxy: Adult fans of animated sitcoms who enjoy casual mobile poker and gambling games.
